'''âp-f-h''' ('''kapafah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hilight|hilight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hilight|hilight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-f-h
|-
! Lemma
| kapafah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipafah|thipafah]] || [[word:jipafah|jipafah]] || [[word:shipafah|shipafah]] || [[word:kipafah|kipafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupafah|thuthupafah]] || [[word:jujupafah|jujupafah]] || [[word:shushupafah|shushupafah]] || [[word:kukupafah|kukupafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupafah|thupafah]] || [[word:jupafah|jupafah]] || [[word:shupafah|shupafah]] || [[word:kupafah|kupafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupafah|thupafah]] || [[word:jupafah|jupafah]] || [[word:shupafah|shupafah]] || [[word:kupafah|kupafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepafah|thepafah]] || [[word:jepafah|jepafah]] || [[word:shepafah|shepafah]] || [[word:kepafah|kepafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopafah|thothopafah]] || [[word:jojopafah|jojopafah]] || [[word:shoshopafah|shoshopafah]] || [[word:kokopafah|kokopafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopafah|thopafah]] || [[word:jopafah|jopafah]] || [[word:shopafah|shopafah]] || [[word:kopafah|kopafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopafah|thopafah]] || [[word:jopafah|jopafah]] || [[word:shopafah|shopafah]] || [[word:kopafah|kopafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpafah|thĂŠpafah]] || [[word:jĂŠpafah|jĂŠpafah]] || [[word:shĂŠpafah|shĂŠpafah]] || [[word:kĂŠpafah|kĂŠpafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapafah|thathapafah]] || [[word:jajapafah|jajapafah]] || [[word:shashapafah|shashapafah]] || [[word:kakapafah|kakapafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapafah|thapafah]] || [[word:japafah|japafah]] || [[word:shapafah|shapafah]] || [[word:kapafah|kapafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapafah|thapafah]] || [[word:japafah|japafah]] || [[word:shapafah|shapafah]] || [[word:kapafah|kapafah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapafah|shapafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapafah|goshapafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapafah|gokishapafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapafahnĂŒ|shapafahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapafahnknĂŒ|goshapafahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafahnĂŒ|gokishapafahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapafahshĂ«|shapafahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapafahnkshĂ«|goshapafahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapafahshĂ«|gokishapafahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafahro|shapafahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafahnkro|goshapafahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafahro|gokishapafahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafahmu|shapafahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafahnkmu|goshapafahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafahmu|gokishapafahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapafahsher|shapafahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapafahnksher|goshapafahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapafahsher|gokishapafahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapafahng|shapafahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapafahnkng|goshapafahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapafahng|gokishapafahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapafahya|shapafahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapafahnkya|goshapafahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapafahya|gokishapafahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapafahyam|shapafahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapafahnkyam|goshapafahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapafahyam|gokishapafahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafahnĂŒshĂ«|shapafahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapafahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapafahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafahnĂŒro|shapafahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafahnknĂŒro|goshapafahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafahnĂŒro|gokishapafahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafahnĂŒmu|shapafahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafahnknĂŒmu|goshapafahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafahnĂŒmu|gokishapafahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafahshĂ«nĂŒ|shapafahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapafahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapafahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafahshĂ«ro|shapafahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafahnkshĂ«ro|goshapafahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafahshĂ«ro|gokishapafahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafahshĂ«mu|shapafahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafahnkshĂ«mu|goshapafahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafahshĂ«mu|gokishapafahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafahronĂŒ|shapafahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafahnkronĂŒ|goshapafahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafahronĂŒ|gokishapafahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafahroshĂ«|shapafahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafahnkroshĂ«|goshapafahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafahroshĂ«|gokishapafahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafahromu|shapafahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafahnkromu|goshapafahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafahromu|gokishapafahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafahmunĂŒ|shapafahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafahnkmunĂŒ|goshapafahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafahmunĂŒ|gokishapafahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafahmushĂ«|shapafahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafahnkmushĂ«|goshapafahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafahmushĂ«|gokishapafahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafahmuro|shapafahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafahnkmuro|goshapafahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafahmuro|gokishapafahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
